title: frasera albicaulis var. idahoensis
intro: Frasera albicaulis var. idahoensis is a variety of the White Sage root plant, specifically native to the Idaho region, and is a perennial herbaceous plant with yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Frasera albicaulis var. idahoensis include relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although modern preparation methods may also involve drying or extracting the plant's roots for further use.
